tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Cypress test fixture and verifies that the documentation panel renders and the downloaded JSON output is well-formed with at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Cypress - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'cypress' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'cypress_single_sample.cy.js', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'cypress', contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - forEach data-driven expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a forEach data-driven Cypress fixture and verifies that each data row is expanded into its own test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Cypress - PO - forEach data-driven expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'cypress' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'cypress_datadriven_sample.cy.js', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'cypress', contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - for...of expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a for...of data-driven Cypress fixture and verifies that each iteration is expanded into its own test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Cypress - PO - for...of expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'cypress' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'cypress_forof_sample.cy.js', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'cypress', contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Cypress - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Cypress test fixture and verifies that the JSON output is well-formed and includes a populated test_coverage_matrix on the first test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Cypress - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'cypress' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'cypress_single_sample.cy.js', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'cypress', contains 1 or more tests, every test has a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a forEach data-driven Cypress fixture and verifies that all data rows are collapsed into a single test entry whose coverage matrix rows match the example count and conform to the Cypress schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'cypress' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'cypress_datadriven_sample.cy.js', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'cypress', contains exactly 1 test, every test has a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the examples, and rows conform to the cypress schema

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a for...of data-driven Cypress fixture and verifies that all iterations are collapsed into a single test entry whose coverage matrix rows match the example count and conform to the Cypress schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'cypress' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'cypress_forof_sample.cy.js', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'cypress', contains exactly 1 test, every test has a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the examples, and rows conform to the cypress schema
